help.title: Help
help.footer: Need more? Contact your dispatcher or Konstantinos Kourentzes (konstantinos@kourentzes.com).
help.section.overview.title: What this app does
help.section.overview.body: Pack Delivery is your driver companion for Soft1 ERP. It lists the deliveries assigned to you today, lets you reorder them, navigate turn-by-turn, scan barcodes to load or find orders, and report each delivery's outcome back to the ERP in real time.
help.section.login.title: Signing in
help.section.login.body: Enter your Soft1 Serial Number (the 11–14 digit installation ID), the App ID (usually 1199), and the username/password your dispatcher gave you. The app pings the tenant first and tells you clearly if the endpoint is unreachable before it even tries to log in.
help.section.list.title: The delivery list
help.section.list.body: The main screen shows every delivery assigned to you today. Each card has the customer name, address, order code, total amount and phone number. Tap 🔍 to view full details, or 'Set as next delivery' to flag it as your next stop. The list refreshes automatically every 10 minutes.
help.section.optimize.title: Optimize route
help.section.optimize.body: Tap 'Optimize route' to sort your deliveries by shortest driving distance. The app first requests a fresh GPS reading so the sort starts from exactly where you are, then runs a nearest-neighbour ordering. The optimized sequence is saved and re-applied on every refresh until you run Optimize again.
help.section.reorder.title: Manual drag reorder
help.section.reorder.body: Grab the ≡ handle on any card and drag it up or down to set your own order. The new order is saved alongside the optimized one and survives reloads. Use 'Clear sort order' to wipe the stored order and start over.
help.section.load.title: Loading deliveries onto the truck
help.section.load.body: Tap 'Load' in the top-right header to open the loading scanner. Scan each order's barcode as you put the pallet on the truck — the app posts a SOACTION with today's date and the 'Φόρτωση Οχήματος' comment. A running list at the bottom of the screen confirms each scan with the SOACTION key returned by Soft1.
help.section.scan.title: Find an order by barcode
help.section.scan.body: Tap 'Σάρωση' / 'Scan' to find an order quickly by scanning its printed barcode. The matching order opens immediately and the Change-status modal pops up automatically, so on-site you can report the outcome in one tap.
help.section.detail.title: Order details
help.section.detail.body: The order page shows the customer, shipping address, phone, payment method and gross total. Line items are grouped by product: lots of the same material are combined into a single line with the summed quantity and unit of measure. Use 'Open in Maps' to start navigation.
help.section.status.title: Changing a delivery's status
help.section.status.body: Tap 'Change status' to set the delivery outcome: In progress, Completed, Postponed, Cancelled or Return. Postponed / Cancelled / Return require a comment. Your selection posts a SOACTION update to Soft1 instantly and the list refreshes.
help.section.maps.title: Navigation with Google Maps
help.section.maps.body: 'Open in Maps' always starts navigation from your current location. A single order uses the stored address; an optimized list passes each stop as a waypoint. Google geocodes the address text, which handles Greek street names more reliably than coordinate lookups.
help.section.offline.title: Working offline
help.section.offline.body: If you lose signal while sending a status change or a load scan, the app stores the request in a local IndexedDB queue and replays it automatically when connectivity returns. You can keep working — the audit trail stays intact.
help.section.geo.title: Location sharing
help.section.geo.body: While the app is in the foreground, the device sends a location ping to Soft1 every 5 minutes, but only when you've actually moved ≥10 m since the last ping. Every action (open order, scan, status change) also stamps your current coordinates. Disable the pings any time via Settings → 'Share location'.
help.section.settings.title: Settings
help.section.settings.body:
- Loading series (Actions): SALDOC series used by the loading scan (default 3200).
- Update series (Actions): SOACTION series used for status changes (default 3201).
- Subsection: read-only for now.
- Barcode field: which SALDOC field the barcode maps to (FINDOC by default).
- Driver ID: read-only, from your Soft1 session.
- Theme / Language: personalisation.
- Share location: turn the background location pings on or off.
